feature_slices.description: Build a requirement validation component that detects placeholder or debug inputs and emits clear elicitation guidance instead of proceeding with empty analysis.
acceptance: Detects strings matching 'Test requirement for debug' or non-functional placeholders
Outputs structured ambiguity report with suggested resolution

feature_slices.description: Create a safe fallback path for the tech research agent when no project files or configuration can be discovered.
acceptance: Returns well-formed JSON research result with confidence_level set to 'low'
Lists all uncertainties and sources as empty when filesystem access fails
Does not block the overall pipeline

feature_slices.description: Implement a specialized risk assessment branch that treats empty/placeholder requirements as a known debug scenario and recommends next steps.
acceptance: Produces JSON containing explicit 'debug scenario' risk with high probability
Includes both ambiguities about intent and impact on downstream work

task_outputs:
I'll research the technology stack for the project at `/home/pat/projects/spine`. Let me explore the codebase to identify existing technologies, patterns, and conventions. I need to start by examining the project structure. I'll use tools to list directories and search for configuration files, documentation, and source code. This will help determine the programming languages, frameworks, build tools, and dependencies in use.

{
  "plan_summary": "Create and execute a minimal debug plan to validate critic gate review process using placeholder test requirement",
  "architecture": {
    "components": [
      {
        "name": "DebugRequirementProcessor",
        "purpose": "Handles analysis and planning for test debug requirements",
        "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/planner/debug_processor.py"],
        "dependencies": []
      },
      {
        "name": "CriticGateReviewer",
        "purpose": "Reviews plans and gates tasks based on quality checks",
        "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/critic/reviewer.py"],
        "dependencies": ["DebugRequirementProcessor"]
      }
    ],
    "data_flow": "Requirement text flows to DebugRequirementProcessor which generates tasks passed to CriticGateReviewer for validation.",
    "interfaces": [
      {
        "name": "IPlanGenerator",
        "methods": ["generate_plan", "validate_tasks"],
        "purpose": "Contract for producing and validating atomic execution plans"
      }
    ]
  },
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": "TASK-001",
      "title": "Inspect project structure",
      "description": "Use ls and glob to explore /home/pat/projects/spine directory and identify existing planner modules",
      "type": "test",
      "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/"],
      "dependencies": [],

      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "No changes; do nothing"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-002",
      "title": "Create placeholder debug plan generator",
      "description": "Write minimal debug_processor.py module that accepts 'Test requirement for debug'",
      "type": "create",
      "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/planner/debug_processor.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-001"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["File created with generate_plan function", "Returns skeleton JSON plan"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Delete the created file"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-003",
      "title": "Implement critic gate review stub",
      "description": "Add reviewer.py with basic gate logic that accepts any plan for test purposes",
      "type": "create",
      "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/critic/reviewer.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-001", "TASK-002"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["review_plan method exists", "Returns pass=true for test input"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Delete the created file"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-004",
      "title": "Unit test the debug flow",
      "description": "Create test_debug.py exercising processor + reviewer integration",
      "type": "test",
      "files": ["/home/pat/projects/spine/tests/test_debug.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-002", "TASK-003"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["All tests pass", "Covers gated plan creation"],
      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Delete test file"
    }
  ],
  "testing_strategy": {
    "unit_tests": ["Test debug processor output structure", "Test critic reviewer always passes for test data"],
    "integration_tests": ["End-to-end: requirement -> processor -> reviewer gate"],
    "manual_tests": ["Run planner on 'Test requirement for debug' and confirm JSON output"],
    "test_order": ["TASK-001", "TASK-002", "TASK-003", "TASK-004"]
  },
  "checkpoints": [
    {
      "after_task": "TASK-003",
      "verify": ["Generated plan is valid JSON", "Critic gate returns pass"],
      "rollback_to": "TASK-002"
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": [
    "Project contains planner/ and critic/ folders or allows creation",
    "Test requirement is intentionally minimal placeholder"
  ],

}
